nodes.label: TelephonyProvider Interface
nodes.rationale: A provider is a self-registering package under api/services/telephony/providers/<name>/ exposing a TelephonyProvider subclass with outbound, webhook, websocket, inbound, transfer methods. get_webhook_response and handle_websocket receive organization_id (the tenant) - pass it straight to run_pipeline_telephony; the workflow owner is deliberately not handed to providers.

nodes.label: ProviderSpec Registry
nodes.rationale: ProviderSpec bundles provider_cls, config_loader, transport_factory, audio_config, request/response schemas, ui_metadata, and account_id_credential_field, registered at import time. Only two import lines outside the provider folder are needed (providers __init__ and the TelephonyConfigRequest union). The UI form is metadata-driven - no per-provider frontend code.
